title: Assessment of On-Firm Losses in Millets Due to Insect Pests
abstract: Pearl millet Penmseium amencanum L occupies a large proportion of the area growing millets in Africa Consequently the insect pests that attack this species have received attention over other millets A list of the major species is presented Actual data on losses due to insect pests on pearl millet are not readily available   Crop loss assessment methods using incidence and damage ratios are discussed Quantitative losses determined from insecticide trials at research station are also presented.
